caption: A woman with dark hair and brown skin is captured in a close-up shot, appearing to be in a video call. She wears a dark-colored, striped button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset with a microphone. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and pale yellow curtains with a hint of blue. To her right, a plain, light-colored surface is partially visible. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each frame. Across the sequence, the woman remains largely stationary, facing forward with a neutral to slightly pensive expression. There is minimal movement as she subtly shifts her gaze and facial muscles, maintaining a consistent posture and position throughout the clip.
